description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 30 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His tracked work spanned 6 projects, and the main languages were Java, Other, and Markdown. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories were recorded this week.
